name: Mongols Mc
description: The Mongols Motorcycle Club is the 3rd-largest outlaw motorcycle club in the world with 4,000-5,000 members in 29 countries. Founded December 5, 1969 in Montebello, California by Hispanic Vietnam veterans who were excluded from the Hells Angels due to race. Allied with the Mexican Mafia — La Eme members recruited heavily from the Mongols. Designated an organized crime group by the DOJ, Australian Federal Police, and Europol. The Hells Angels ceded Southern California to the Mongols in the 1980s. The US government tried and failed multiple times to seize their trademarked logo through civil forfeiture. Involved in methamphetamine trafficking, money laundering, extortion, and murder.
